prompt_text:
### Demographics: 39-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.6 kg; Height 161.7 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 120/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.1%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 9.3%), FPG (12 months ago 231mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 249mg/dL; 3 months ago 262mg/dL; current 237mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 55.9kg; 9 months ago 55.3kg; 6 months ago 53.1kg; 3 months ago 56.1kg; current 54.6kg), Height (12 months ago 161.7cm; 9 months ago 161.7cm; 6 months ago 161.7cm; 3 months ago 161.7cm; current 161.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 121mmHg; current 120mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 60U/L; 6 months ago 61U/L; 3 months ago 62U/L; current 58U/L), AST (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 50U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 43U/L; current 46U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 579mg/g; 9 months ago 598mg/g; 6 months ago 676mg/g; 3 months ago 743mg/g; current 972mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 94mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 190mg/dL; 6 months ago 186mg/dL; 3 months ago 173mg/dL; current 179mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.18 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
